card.title: Higher Secondary (Science)
card.description: Specialized science stream with Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and Mathematics for students pursuing science careers and university entrance.

page.title: Higher Secondary Science Stream
page.subtitle: Classes XI-XII: Preparing for science careers and competitive university entrance.

headOfDepartment.name: Mrs. Michellyne Syiem
headOfDepartment.quote: Science education is about developing critical thinking and research aptitude. We prepare students not just for exams, but for scientific careers.

subPrograms.title: Class XI (Science)

subPrograms.title: Class XII (Science) + Boards
subPrograms.description: Board examinations combined with advanced preparation for competitive exams like JEE and NEET.
